title: Showcase segment SOP
body: Segment SOP for the Brightwater nail art competition. Load in Friday December 11 14:00 to 18:00. Doors December 12 08:30. Segment 09:00 to 12:00. Judging deliberation 12:00 to 12:45. Awards 13:00. Sixteen stations two rows of eight. Judge table centered north wall seating five. Score runner desk east of judge table. Parent viewing area roped off south and west walls three foot standoff.

title: Showcase judging rubric
body: Total points 100. Technical execution 35. Design cohesion 30. Sanitation and setup 20. Presentation and finish 15. Any hygiene infraction fixed 10 point deduction after averaging. Ties within one point broken by sanitation and setup score. Judges with declared conflict recuse on that row.

title: Photo and video release governance
body: All showcase competitors carry a signed release before appearing in any public lineup post or photograph. Adult cohort students sign own releases via DocuSign envelope template tpl_cohort_release. Regional competitors sign via tpl_regional_release. Pending or declined names held out of any public draft until Julie confirms.

title: Kit operations playbook
body: Kit BOM lives in Airtable base appJulieStorefront. Cost roll up sums component wholesale cost per BOM. Retail price set with minimum floor per kit. If corrected wholesale drops margin below floor hold parent facing pitch and vendor reminder as drafts and flag for Julie sign off before anything goes out.

title: Multi channel inventory reconciliation
body: Storefront population spans BigCommerce WooCommerce Amazon Seller Etsy. Rebuild single reconciled stock line per SKU. Winning rail is most recently reconciled physical count where one exists otherwise newest platform sync. Name the winning rail and the rail set aside for every SKU flagged.
